error.message: Could not generate schema snapshot: Everspot repository does not exist at configured path
error.blocker: Repository must be cloned/available before schema extraction can run
error.impact: Model generation blocked until real schema snapshot is created
remediation_steps: 1. Clone or symlink Everspot repository to /Users/cashkalina/code/everspot-brain/everspot
2. Ensure Everspot is runnable: .env configured, composer install completed
3. Run central database migrations: php artisan migrate --database=central
5. Generate snapshot: php artisan wiki:schema-snapshot central --output=/path/to/wiki/schema/central.json
